summary: Isabel and Elric are attempting to confront Paul Weyl, but their path is blocked by the Blue Wolves, who have been sent by Paul to avenge his lost men. Isabel puts her life on the line to fight back and protect innocent civilians, while Elric struggles with his own limitations as he faces off against the Blue Wolves' leader.
key_moments: The Blue Wolves attack the city, attempting to lure out Isabel and annihilate her team
Isabel draws her sword to protect the innocent civilians, putting herself in harm's way
Elric struggles with his own limitations as he faces off against the Blue Wolves' leader
